prestazioni: Engine swap to a GM LT4 (6.2L V8, engine code LT4) with a forged internals build by Callies (crankshaft, connecting rods) and Mahle pistons, paired with a custom camshaft grind from Comp Cams (243/249 duration, .624/.624 lift, 114 LSA) for high-RPM power delivery (700+ HP on E85).

Precision Turbo & Engine PT6766CE turbocharger (67mm inducer, 76mm exducer) with a custom 4-inch V-band downpipe and a Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate, feeding into a custom intercooler core by PWR (1200HP-rated) with dual 4-inch silicone couplers from Vibrant Performance.

Fuel system upgrade featuring dual Bosch 044 fuel pumps, Injector Dynamics ID1700x injectors, and a Radium Engineering dual catch can setup with AN-10 lines, controlled via a Holley Dominator ECU with a custom flex-fuel sensor calibration for E85 compatibility.
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-XTS widebody conversion kit with custom carbon fiber fender flares (3.5-inch extension per side) and a custom front splitter with integrated canards, all finished in a satin-finish 3M Matte Military Green wrap.

Air Design USA custom rear diffuser with integrated quad 4-inch titanium exhaust tips (custom fabrication by Burns Stainless) and a custom carbon fiber trunk spoiler (3D-scanned from a CTS-V Coupe for XTS-specific fitment).

OEM+ aggressive stance with KW Clubsport 3-way coilovers (custom valving for XTS chassis) and a custom subframe reinforcement kit by BMR Suspension, paired with Forgeline GA3R 20x10.5 front and 20x12 rear wheels (ET35/ET40) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30/20 and 315/30/20).
